appraisal_events.evidence: « je crus faire preuve de pénétration et de force en lui disant quelques paroles ironiques et blessantes ... je réussis du moins à faire disparaître de son visage cette expression joyeuse »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator intentionally uses ironic, hurtful remarks to neutralize the grandmother’s pleasure in being photographed, effectively dampening her visible joy. The narration frames this as a regrettable act.

status_effects.explanation: Her joy is visibly extinguished by the narrator’s cutting remarks, leaving her locally worse off emotionally.
